description: Certificate of Occupancy — validates all final inspections, fire sign-offs, utility connections, and as-built conditions before issuing occupancy authorization

hard_stops.label: Final Inspection Not Passed
hard_stops.logic: One or more required final inspections have not been passed — CO cannot be issued per IBC 111.1

hard_stops.label: Fire Department Sign-Off Missing
hard_stops.logic: Fire department has not signed off on fire protection systems and means of egress — CO requires fire marshal approval

hard_stops.label: Health Department Clearance Missing
hard_stops.logic: Building includes food service, pool, or other regulated use requiring health department clearance — not yet obtained

soft_flags.label: Temporary CO Requested
soft_flags.logic: Applicant has requested a temporary certificate of occupancy — verify that outstanding items are non-life-safety and set expiration date
